description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:6 Docker image for most jobs and the webcastudiohub/selenium-karma image for the test jobs. Define four stages: install, lint, test, and coverage. Add an install job that runs npm install and saves the node_modules/ directory as an artifact. Add a lint job that depends on install, runs npm run lint, and uses the node:6 image. Add tests:chrome and tests:firefox jobs in the test stage that depend on install, execute service selenium start in before_script, run npm run test:ci:chrome (or npm run test:ci:firefox) respectively, and publish the coverage/ directory as an artifact. Finally, add coverage:chrome and coverage:firefox jobs in the coverage stage that depend on install and their corresponding test jobs, use the node:6 image, and run npm run coverage.
